channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [COALINDIA] Coal India Ltd Reports Provisional Production and Offtake Performance for Mar’26 and Apr’25-Mar’26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coal India Ltd has released the provisional production and offtake performance for the month of Mar’26 and the period from Apr’25 to Mar’26. This information is provided as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015 for your information and record.

  • Coal production and offtake performance for Mar’26 and Apr’25-Mar’26 have been released.
  • The report includes provisional figures for both production and offtake.
  • The update is provided as per the SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015.
  • Coal India Ltd is a Maharatna Company.
  • The company's registered office is located in Kolkata.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COAL INDIA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MODULEX] Modulex Construction Technologies Ltd: Suchit Punnose Creates Pledge of 18,92,489 Equity Shares
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on March 31, 2026 from Suchit Punnose. The disclosure pertains to the pledge of 18,92,489 Equity Shares of Modulex Construction Technologies Limited. The shares have been encumbered with Pyxis Finvest Limited against financial assistance.

  • Suchit Punnose creates pledge of 18,92,489 Equity Shares of Modulex Construction Technologies Limited.
  • Pledge created on March 31, 2026.
  • Shares encumbered with Pyxis Finvest Limited.
  • Encumbrance made against financial assistance from Pyxis Finvest Limited.
  • Suchit Punnose is a Promoter and Whole Time Director of Modulex Construction Technologies Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Modulex Construction Technologies Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [CANBK] Canara Bank Submits Shareholding Details in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Canara Bank, as the promoter of Can Fin Homes Limited, Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Ltd and Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd, has submitted details of shareholding in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The bank declared that no encumbrance has been made by the 'promoter along with person acting in concert' during the financial year 2025-26. The disclosures include the number of shares, voting rights, warrants, convertible securities held by Canara Bank in each of the target companies as of 31st March 2026.

  • Canara Bank submits shareholding details in compliance with SEBI regulations
  • No encumbrance made by 'promoter along with person acting in concert' during 2025-26
  • Canara Bank holds 29.99% shares in Can Fin Homes Limited
  • Canara Bank holds 36.50% shares in Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Ltd
  • Canara Bank holds 38.00% shares in Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CANARA BANK | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [INDOBELL] Indobell Insulations Ltd Loses Export Order Worth 73,500 US Dollars
item.description:
Indobell Insulations Limited had secured an Export Order for ST Blanket Thermal Insulation worth 73,500 US Dollars from GE VERNOVA PARTS & PRODUCTS GmbH - BADEN, SWITZERLAND. However, the company has now received a communication from the awarding entity stating that the Purchase Order was placed by mistake and should be disregarded. This effectively cancels the order.

  • Indobell Insulations Ltd loses an export order worth 73,500 US Dollars
  • The order was secured from GE VERNOVA PARTS & PRODUCTS GmbH - BADEN, SWITZERLAND
  • The order has been cancelled due to a mistake in the placement of the Purchase Order
  • The cancellation was communicated via an email dated 31.03.2026
  • Indobell Insulations Ltd has requested to treat the earlier disclosure as withdrawn / cancelled

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indobell Insulations Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CHEMOPH] Star Source Multi Trade Ltd Clarifies Price Movement of Shares on BSE Limited Inquiry
item.description:
Star Source Multi Trade Ltd has responded to BSE Limited's request for clarification on the price movement of the company's shares. The company reaffirms its compliance with Regulation 30 and other applicable regulations of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015. Star Source Multi Trade Ltd has consistently disclosed all price sensitive information and events impacting its operations and performance. The company states that the price movement is market-driven and will continue to inform the stock exchange of any required information under the said regulations.

  • Star Source Multi Trade Ltd clarifies price movement of shares following BSE Limited inquiry.
  • Company reaffirms compliance with SEBI regulations and discloses all price sensitive information.
  • Price movement of shares attributed to market forces.
  • Company remains committed to informing the stock exchange of any required information under the regulations.
  • Star Source Multi Trade Ltd emphasizes its adherence to Regulation 30 and other applicable regulations of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHEMO PHARMA LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ARSSBL] Anand Rathi Financial Services Ltd Creates Pledge on Equity Shares of Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd
item.description:
Anand Rathi Financial Services Ltd (ARFSL) has created a pledge on equity shares of Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd. The total number of shares pledged is 4,38,45,400, which is 69.90% of the total share capital. The shares were pledged on March 30, 2026, for availing the Margin Limits. The entities in whose favor shares were encumbered include Suresh Rathi Securities Private Limited and Twelfth Tier Property Limited, among others.

  • Anand Rathi Financial Services Ltd has created a pledge on 69.90% of the total share capital of Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd.
  • The pledge was created on March 30, 2026, for availing the Margin Limits.
  • The entities in whose favor shares were encumbered include Suresh Rathi Securities Private Limited and Twelfth Tier Property Limited, among others.
  • The total number of shares pledged is 4,38,45,400.
  • This disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anand Rathi Share And Stock Brokers Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [PETPLST] Pet Plastics Ltd to Sell Subsidiary Exuberant Systems Private Limited for Rs. 4.68 Crores
item.description:
Pet Plastics Ltd has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement with ANS Buggy LLP for the transfer of entire equity shares held in its subsidiary, Exuberant Systems Private Limited. The expected date of completion of sale is 31st March, 2026, with a consideration of Rs. 4,68,24,000. Exuberant Systems Private Limited was incorporated on 06th August, 2014, and contributed 0% to the consolidated income and net worth of Pet Plastics Ltd as on 31st March 2025. ANS Buggy LLP is not a promoter of Bharatam Ventures Limited.

  • Pet Plastics Ltd to sell its subsidiary, Exuberant Systems Private Limited, to ANS Buggy LLP
  • The sale is expected to be completed on 31st March, 2026
  • The consideration for the sale is Rs. 4,68,24,000
  • Exuberant Systems Private Limited was incorporated on 06th August, 2014
  • ANS Buggy LLP is not a promoter of Bharatam Ventures Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PET PLASTICS LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [AMARAJABAT] Amara Raja Energy & Mobility Ltd Announces Changes in Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Amara Raja Energy & Mobility Ltd has announced changes in its senior management personnel. Mr. Dwarakanadha Reddy B has succeeded Mr. S Vijayanand as Business Head of Amara Raja Advanced Cell Technologies Private Limited (ARACT) and Mr. Divakar S has succeeded Mr. Indeevar Govardhanagiri as Chief Marketing Officer - International. The changes are a part of the company's succession and leadership transition plan.

  • Mr. Dwarakanadha Reddy B appointed as Business Head of ARACT
  • Mr. Divakar S appointed as Chief Marketing Officer - International
  • Appointments are part of the company's succession and leadership transition plan
  • Mr. Dwarakanadha Reddy B brings nearly three decades of experience
  • Mr. Divakar S has over 25 years of professional experience in sales and marketing

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMARA RAJA BATTERIES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PUNJLLOYD] Punj Lloyd Ltd to Sell 100% Shareholding in Sembawang Infrastructure for INR 0.01 Per Share
item.description:
Punj Lloyd Ltd has entered into a share purchase agreement with Diversified India Growth Fund for the sale of 100% of the shareholding in Sembawang Infrastructure (India) Private Limited. The agreement is for INR 0.01 per share. Sembawang Infrastructure did not have revenue in the last financial year. The expected date of completion of sale is March 31, 2026. Diversified India Growth Fund is an alternative investment scheme of Diversified India Growth Trust and is registered as a Category II Alternative Investment Fund with the Securities and Exchange Board of India. None of the buyers belong to the promoter, promoter group, or group companies. The transaction is not a related party transaction and is not done outside the Scheme of Arrangement.

  • Punj Lloyd Ltd to sell 100% shareholding in Sembawang Infrastructure
  • Transaction value is INR 0.01 per share
  • Sembawang Infrastructure did not have revenue in the last financial year
  • Diversified India Growth Fund is the buyer
  • Transaction is not a related party transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Punj Lloyd Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [NEOINFRA] Promoter Group Acquires Shares in Neo Infracon Ltd: 0.05% Increase in Holding
item.description:
Neo Infracon Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Navin Chand Suchanti & PACs. The disclosure reveals a substantial acquisition of shares by the Promoter Group, Darshik D. Mehta. The acquisition includes 7,500 shares, which amounts to a 0.05% increase in the total diluted share capital of the company. The shares were acquired through an open market transaction on March 30, 2026. Before the acquisition, the Promoter Group held 3,69,550 shares, which has now increased to 3,77,050 shares after the acquisition. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remain unchanged at 53,06,800 equity shares.

  • Promoter Group acquires 7,500 shares in Neo Infracon Ltd.
  • 0.05% increase in the total diluted share capital of the company.
  • Open market transaction on March 30, 2026.
  • Before the acquisition, the Promoter Group held 3,69,550 shares.
  • After the acquisition, the Promoter Group holds 3,77,050 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NEO INFRACON LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
